case_title: ADAM BERMAN VS. DAVID L EPSTEIN

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2021 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2021 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,411.67 FILED BY BERMAN, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT EPSTEIN, DAVID L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); [DOCUMENT STAMPED: BY FAX] SERVED NOV-14-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EPSTEIN, DAVID L

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ADAM BERMAN IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS CHRIS GOUMAS. DEFENDANT DAVID EPSTEIN IS PRESENT. RELATED CASE: 20-863823. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERMAN, ADAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EPSTEIN, DAVID L $5,204.17 PRINCIPAL, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,410.17, BOTH MATTERS, 20-863824 & 20-863823, WERE HEARD AT THE SAME TIME. $91 COPYING INCLUDED IN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
